markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To refine Surge AI's brand positioning and narrative, focusing on key pillars, customer perceptions, and unique value propositions.](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current perception of Surge AI is mixed: high-quality but potentially "cagey" or difficult to work with](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Need to better articulate Surge's technology and processes without revealing sensitive details](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Considering repositioning as a "post-training research lab" rather than just a data vendor](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Identified gaps in messaging around Surge's feedback loop, measurement processes, and collaboration style](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)

## Topics

### Current Brand Perception

  - [Viewed as "cagey underdog" with high-quality output but potentially difficult to work with](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Some customers perceive Surge as looking down on them or being overly selective](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Compared to a "mature-ish professor" rather than a "scrappy, hungry" startup](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Lack of institutional presence may hinder larger deals ($100M+)](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Customer Priorities and Competition

  - [Customers (AI labs) want to be perceived as "obsessed," fast-moving, and aggressive about scaling](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [OpenAI and Anthropic seen as current market leaders](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [LMSys leaderboard and Twitter sentiment are key, though imperfect, measures of success](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [Product experience (UI, speed, formatting) significantly impacts preference, even over model quality](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

### Surge's Unique Value Proposition

  - [High-quality data and technology, but struggling to articulate specifics without revealing trade secrets](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Strong collaborative relationships with researchers, often preferred over internal teams](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Robust internal quality control processes (e.g., review thresholds, AI usage detection)](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - [Challenge in balancing transparency about processes with maintaining operational flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)

### Potential Positioning Pillars

  - [Data refinement and quality (technology, operations, workforce)](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [Trust and partnership with customers](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Research collaboration and expertise](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Measurement and continuous improvement (signals, feedback loop)](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)

### Future Vision and Aspirations

  - [Desire to see AI unlock new capabilities (e.g., long-form creative writing, running $100M companies)](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [Potential to position Surge as leaders in agent-based AI data and quality measurement](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Refine positioning pillars, considering the balance between technology and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Develop concrete examples and language to articulate Surge's processes without oversharing](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Explore "post-training research lab" positioning and its implications](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Prepare more detailed questions about Surge's end-to-end quality control process](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [Draft initial messaging ideas based on workshop insights for team review](https://fathom.video/share/VzK6Y11UpW2t42ZGRXtw7xj9oj_Cbs-3?tab=summary&timestamp=3001.0)
